title: SUMMER CAMPS - 211info
text: BEND PARK AND RECREATION DISTRICT SUMMER CAMPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides over a hundred half-day and full-day youth summer camps, including outdoor camps, STEM, art, and technology camps. 799 SW Columbia Street Bend, OR 97702 Eligibility: Most activities are for children ages 6-17 Hours: Varies by camp. Visit website for the event calendar. Email (541) 389-7275 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 389-7275 Main phone Main phone (541) 389-7275 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by camp DOCUMENTS: Proof of income or current eligibility/award letter for SNAP, TANF, or OHP if applying for scholarship AREA SERVED: City of Bend SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Camps Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - RECREATION DISTRICT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BEND PARK AND RECREATION DISTRICT
